summary: Over the past year, the engineer has heavily focused on building a SaaS crypto trading platform, while also advancing multiple hardware-firmware projects, AI/ML research, and developer tooling. Key themes include algorithmic trading infrastructure, embedded systems for HID and e-readers, and AI-powered assistants.

items.title: Windows input filter driver development
items.description: Built and iterated on a kernel-mode input filtering and injection driver for Windows.

items.title: Android TTS engine implementation
items.description: Developed a text-to-speech engine for Android using Silero and custom phonetizers.

items.title: E-reader custom firmware expansion
items.description: Extended biscuit firmware for xteink devices with a knowledge base app and mesh chat fixes.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform development
items.description: Iterated on a crypto algorithmic trading platform, focusing on infrastructure, billing, and user onboarding.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware iteration
items.description: Developed new firmware variants for a feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation device.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Polished a Windows Explorer extension for tagging files and folders, including release automation.

items.title: Computer vision aim assist tool
items.description: Worked on a personal C++ project involving screen capture, overlay, and input emulation.

items.title: E-reader custom firmware development
items.description: Built a custom firmware for xteink devices, adding a map application and knowledge base.

items.title: Clash proxy client fork maintenance
items.description: Maintained a fork of a proxy client, updating dependencies and exposing new APIs.

items.title: Android LLM assistant development
items.description: Built an on-device LLM assistant for Android with tool-use and sub-agent delegation capabilities.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Conducted research and experimentation on a machine learning model for crypto price prediction.

items.title: E-ink launcher application
items.description: Developed a minimalist Android launcher centered around note-taking for e-ink readers.

items.title: Code intelligence engine development
items.description: Built a graph-powered code intelligence engine with LSP integration and multi-language support.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Maintained a fork of a Telegram integration node for the n8n automation platform.

items.title: Personal Neovim configuration
items.description: Maintained a personal Neovim development environment configuration.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Built a minimalistic, browser-based labeling tool for YOLO object detection projects.

items.title: Computer vision for online poker
items.description: Developed a computer vision pipeline for analyzing online poker games.

items.title: Claude Code automation tooling
items.description: Updated an n8n node for integrating with the Claude AI coding agent.

items.title: Android task management app
items.description: Started a personal Android application for task management.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Developed an autonomous multi-session AI coding assistant with worktree and merge management.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy development
items.description: Iterated on numerous algorithmic trading strategies for the Freqtrade platform.

items.title: Freqtrade Telegram bot development
items.description: Built a Telegram bot for managing and monitoring Freqtrade trading bots.

items.title: Freqtrade mobile monitor app
items.description: Developed a mobile application for monitoring Freqtrade bot performance.

items.title: Telegram automation bots
items.description: Maintained a personal Telegram bot for content forwarding and summarization.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy optimization
items.description: Optimized and backtested algorithmic trading strategies for the Freqtrade platform.

items.title: Crypto trading signal bot
items.description: Developed a Telegram bot for generating and sending crypto trading signals.

items.title: ChatGPT Telegram bot development
items.description: Built a .NET-based Telegram bot integrating with ChatGPT.
